title: linear-loom events read output
description: Output contract for `linear-loom events read <slug>`. DESIGN.md § 8: linear-loom drops events.jsonl as a substrate concept; Linear's native audit data is the event trail. This verb synthesizes a loom-compatible events array from Project / Milestone / Sub-Issue-comment timestamps. v1 covers the load-bearing trio (project-initialized + phase-started + checkin-created); pr-opened / pr-merged (from GitHub-PR Issue attachments) and phase-completed (from Milestone state-change history) are documented follow-ups. ev-linear pins to schema_version=1 and refuses to parse on mismatch.

schema_version.description: Bumps on breaking changes to the output shape. ev-linear pins to a known schema_version.

slug.description: The operator-chosen short name for the loom-project. Matches the marker file's slug field.

events.description: Loom-compatible events synthesized from Linear, sorted by `at` ascending. Filter flags --since / --event / --limit apply after synthesis and before emission.

ProjectInitializedEvent.description: Synthesized from Linear Project.createdAt. Exactly one per output.

PhaseStartedEvent.description: Synthesized from each ProjectMilestone.createdAt whose name parses via the `<slug> · Phase N — <prose>` convention (DESIGN.md § 5 + § 6). Milestones with unparseable names are skipped.

CheckinCreatedEvent.description: Synthesized from each Sub-Issue comment whose body parses as a U2-rendered checkin (carries both `**Checkin number**:` and `**Branch**:` header lines). Free-form comments without that header pair are skipped.

branch.description: Branch name the checkin was written for.
